session.user:
Run pytest on tests/commands/stack/test_sync_cmd.py and report results. Also run ruff check on: - src/erk/core/stack_sync.py - src/erk/cli/commands/stack/sync_cmd.py - tests/commands/stack/test_sync_cmd.py
Report all output.
session.assistant: I'll run pytest on the test file and ruff checks on the specified files.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on test_sync_cmd.py with verbose output

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/erk/core/stack_sync.py src/erk/cli/commands/stack/sync_cmd.py tests/commands/stack/test_sync_cmd.py
Run ruff check on three specified files

session.tool_result:
Exit code 1 ============================= test session starts ============================== platform linux -- Python 3.13.12, pytest-9.0.2, pluggy-1.6.0 rootdir: /home/runner/work/erk/erk configfile: pyproject.toml plugins: anyio-4.12.1, cov-7.0.0, xdist-3.8.0, asyncio-1.3.0 asyncio: mode=Mode.AUTO, debug=False, asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope=function, asyncio_default_test_loop_scope=function collected 11 items
tests/commands/stack/test_sync_cmd.py .......F... [100%]
=================================== FAILURES =================================== _______________________ test_sync_conflict_aborts_rebase _______________________
def test_sync_conflict_aborts_rebase() -> None: """Test that rebase conflicts are aborted and reported.""" runner = CliRunner() with erk_inmem_env(runner) as env: git, graphite = env.build_ops_from_branches( { "main": BranchMetadata.trunk( "main", children=["feat-1"], ), "feat-1": BranchMetadata.branch("feat-1", "main"), }, current_branch="feat-1", ) git.branch._remote_branches[env.cwd] = ["origin/feat-1"] git.branch._branch_divergence[ (env.cwd, "feat-1", "origin")
... [37 lines omitted] ...
# Configure pull_rebase to return error on the remote subgateway git.remote._pull_rebase_error = PullRebaseError( # Rebase is in progress after failed pull obj=test_ctx, catch_exceptions=False, tests/commands/stack/test_sync_cmd.py:342: AssertionError WARNING root:cli.py:159 Failed to check version: 'MockResult' object has no attribute 'stdout' FAILED tests/commands/stack/test_sync_cmd.py::test_sync_conflict_aborts_rebase - assert 0 == 1 ========================= 1 failed, 10 passed in 0.78s =========================
session.assistant:
## Results
**pytest failed: 1 issue found**
- **File**: tests/commands/stack/test_sync_cmd.py::test_sync_conflict_aborts_rebase - **Location**: Line 342 - **Error**: AssertionError - `assert 0 == 1` - Expected `git.rebase_abort_calls` to have 1 call, but it has 0 calls - **Test Status**: 10 passed, 1 failed in 0.78s
The test is checking that when a rebase conflict occurs, the code calls `rebase_abort()` on the git gateway. The assertion shows that `rebase_abort_calls` is empty (length 0), meaning the abort call was never made.
**ruff check passed: All checks passed!**
All three files passed ruff linting: - /home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/core/stack_sync.py - /home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/stack/sync_cmd.py - /home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/stack/test_sync_cmd.py
